name: Ukrainian SSR (1929–1937)

colors.symbolism: the revolutionary struggle of the working class

description: A red field with the gold Cyrillic letters У.С.Р.Р. (UkrSSR) in the upper hoist, surrounded by a gold border.
history: Adopted in 1929 with a redesigned acronym using the Ukrainian-language transcription У.С.Р.Р. (Ukrainska Sotsialistychna Radianska Respublika). A gold border was added to the field. Replaced in 1937.

features.role: Cyrillic letters У.С.Р.Р. (the Ukrainian-language acronym for the Ukrainian Soviet Socialist Republic)
